description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a light gray brick exterior and a complex, dark hip roof. The front features a prominent covered porch with columns, wide steps, and symmetrical landscaping with tall shrubs. Multiple windows are arranged in neat rows on both floors, and the main entryway is accentuated by an arched transom window above the door. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture, a grill, and a swing set, suggesting a family-oriented design. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, and mature trees provide shade and privacy along the sides.
description: A spacious two-story gray brick house with a dark hip roof, covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a large backyard deck with outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, wide steps, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the driveway, garage entrance, and a large tree partially obscuring the side of the house.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a large wooden deck with outdoor furniture, a grill, and a swing set, as well as sliding glass doors.
description_view_3: This side view displays the upper and lower rows of windows, a balcony, and the edge of the backyard deck.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, arched transom window, and decorative landscaping
